td.div:
Analyze your messages and track how many messages were sent and to whom.
PERIOD: Select the time period for the report.
Details within the report:
TO: Email or number the message was sent to.
SCHEDULED: When the message was scheduled to be sent.
STATUS: Status of message:
Queued (orange)
Sent (green)
Failed (red)
SENT: The date and time the message was sent to the receipient.
OPENED (Email only): The date and time the receipient opened the email.
BOUNCED (Email only): The date and time the email bounced.
